description_long: This is a brown open-toe sandal featuring two wide leather straps across the top, each secured with a large, dark metal buckle. The footbed is contoured and appears to be made of cork or a similar material, showing signs of wear and foot imprinting. The outsole is relatively thin and flat, likely made of rubber, providing some grip for urban surfaces. The leather upper has a matte, slightly distressed finish, with visible creases and scuffs indicating regular use. The sandal's design is ergonomic, with a raised arch and heel cup for comfort. There are no visible logos or brand markings, but the style is reminiscent of classic comfort sandals.
description: A brown leather sandal with two buckle straps and a contoured, worn cork footbed. The sandal shows visible signs of use and has a matte, distressed finish.
description_view_0: Rear angled view showing the contoured footbed, heel cup, and the inside of the straps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two buckle straps and the profile of the cork footbed.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the open toe area and the alignment of the straps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the outer side of the sandal and the thickness of the sole.
